title: I need some help for D and R
display_title: I need some help for D and R
wikitext:
[]: I need some help for D&R             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Aug 11, 2005 1:51 pm I have hust saw the Italian version of D&R that was realesed one weeek ago. I have some stupid questio, please tell me the ansewer, I think that these aren't hard question: what about EVA-04? It's supposed to be in the orginal version, right? And this version claims itself as Death&Rebirth, it doens't seems to be Death(True)^2 or something like that. Also the animation of the explosion of the 00 and the Longinus spear are like the TV version, and not like the LD version hjow I supposed that it was to be. My old DivX version is like this one, but I thought that it was Death(true)^2! Can you explain me this? And what about the Dies Irae? Where it's supposed to be? It's a part of the D&R soundtrack, right? I haven't heard it.... Thank you in advance (and go to the hell to the panini guys, it's also the German edition of D&R this one).

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Thu Aug 11, 2005 2:05 pm EVA-04 makes no appearance in the series, and to my understanding, doesn't show up in any edit of Death. (I haven't seen all of them... I don't think). Also the animation of the explosion of the 00 and the Longinus spear are like the TV version, and not like the LD version hjow I supposed that it was to be.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Aug 11, 2005 2:32 pm I'm feard that I wasn't clear (English isn't my native language, I'm sorry). EVA-04 makes no appearance in the series, and to my understanding, doesn't show up in any edit of Death. (I haven't seen all of them... I don't think).

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Thu Aug 11, 2005 4:14 pm i dont think that unit 04 makes any appearances in any of the films (the only drawings were concept works and those for the models that were later distributed)

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Aug 11, 2005 5:43 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: I'm referring to the 15th angel.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Aug 11, 2005 6:12 pm Mr. Tines wrote: though the Platinum version of 23' lacks the pictures overlain on the Reiquarium (like the one showing EVA-01 attached to Lilith).

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Thu Aug 11, 2005 11:23 pm The DC scenes were intended for the episodes, but also added for D&R. I'm not sure but I think D&R was released before the video versions of 21'-24'. All existing versions of Death are the Death (True)^2 version. The first two versions were one released in theatres and the other through wowow channel. When they released in video it was already True^2.

[]:             Quote Post by RuaDragon » Fri Aug 12, 2005 12:57 am Hexon.Arq wrote: Also the animation of the explosion of the 00 and the Longinus spear are like the TV version, and not like the LD version how I supposed that it was to be.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Aug 12, 2005 3:06 am So you can confirm me that the theatrical edition with all the DC scenes wasn't never realeased for the home video market and all the exisisting versions are the Revival' s one , called Death(TRUE)^2 ? thank you, I was very confused about D&R.... P.S.: GNR

[]:             Quote Post by Toilet Duck » Fri Aug 12, 2005 3:29 am in the director's cut of episode 23 ("Rei iii"), 00 turns into something resembling a giant white nude Rei with a halo before exploding. in the original version, there's just an explosion. i assume that's what you're asking about...

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Aug 12, 2005 3:41 am yep, but I don't know what GNR means.

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Fri Aug 12, 2005 6:28 am GNR means Giant Naked Rei, or whatever you'd like to call the Lilith/Adam/Rei III... Thing... in EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Aug 12, 2005 6:48 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: Mr. Tines wrote: though the Platinum version of 23' lacks the pictures overlain on the Reiquarium (like the one showing EVA-01 attached to Lilith).

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Aug 12, 2005 10:14 am Ryo wrote: GNR means Giant Naked Rei, or whatever you'd like to call the Lilith/Adam/Rei III... Thing... in EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Fri Aug 12, 2005 10:29 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: O.K., I haven't ever seen this resurrection DVD unfortunately, but is it a Japanese realease or an ADV's one?

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Fri Aug 12, 2005 2:03 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: So you can confirm me that the theatrical edition with all the DC scenes wasn't never realeased for the home video market and all the exisisting versions are the Revival' s one , called Death(TRUE)^2 ? thank you, I was very confused about D&R.... P.S.: GNR

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Aug 12, 2005 2:14 pm What a mess! By the way this article solves an enigma about the ending credit that we were talkin' in another topic, I have the divx of the theatrical edition and Oboe have a fansub of the video edition! The enigma is solved! About Death I know something about it that I've read on the Evangelion Otaku FAQ (it says that in Death(true)^2 there are some little video addiction, like Adam in the hand of Gendo....).

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Fri Aug 12, 2005 2:40 pm Yes, but those scenes are the ones that were also added to the video release of episodes 21-24, known as "Directors Cut". D&R has scenes of the series, and also of the modified episodes.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Aug 12, 2005 2:42 pm Yep, this was my only certainty.
summary: []: I need some help for D&R             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Aug 11, 2005 1:51 pm I have hust saw the Italian version of D&R that was realesed one weeek ago. I have some stupid questio, please tell me the ansewer, I think that these aren't hard question: what about EVA-04? It's supposed to be in the orginal version, right? And this version claims itself as Death&Rebirth, it doens't seems to be Death&#4
